blended.narrative: Fernie Alpine Resort is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 7 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 3,471 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 6" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
